data_coverage_summary: Vehicle Gateway API exposes telematics device identity and connectivity status for onboard gateways, making it useful for tracking gateway inventory and operational health.
buyer_guidance: Use Vehicle Gateway API when the integration needs the identity and operational status of Motive telematics hardware rather than vehicle master data or downstream commands.
overview: Vehicle Gateway API is the Motive surface for onboard telematics device identity and gateway health state. It supports asset modeling for the gateway hardware and provides operational connectivity status, but it is not documented as a command or writeback interface. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Not Supported.

available_data.description: The API combines gateway identity with device health and connectivity context.

ingest_considerations: This API is useful for telematics-device observability but does not replace the core vehicle asset API.
Because no mutation operations are documented for this surface, remediation actions should be handled outside this API.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the Motive Open API reference and the captured product summary describing telematics device identity, status, and onboard fleet connectivity data for vehicle gateways.
